Read more Anal Fistula There is usually the result of an infection near the anus causing a collection of pus [abscess] in the nearby tissue. Anal Fissure Anal fissures are the small tears formed in the anal lining. They are also known as anal ulcers. Anal itching Anal itching or pruritus ani is the frequently observed in the ano rectal diseases. Constipation Constipation is a condition of the digestive system where an individual has hard feces that are difficult to expel. Dr Dnyanesh Chavan Dr Dnyanesh Chavan is a senior proctologist practising in Navi Mumbai. He is having 18 year experience in Anorectal practice. Graduate and post graduate from Mumbai and Nanded University respectively. Currently working as a professor in Department of surgery at Yerla Ayu.Medical college,Hospital and Post Graduate institute. KHARGHAR Navi Mumbai. Since last 7 years working as (PG) Post Graduate and Phd. Guide for MUHS Maharashtra University of Health Sciences. Active participation in two events of Limca book of world Record of piles surgeries in 2011 with 290 (Highest) cases in a day and Instagpain management By Viddhagni in 2018 on occasion world Health Day. Performed more than 2000 surgeries with different modalities like Laser KSHARSUTRA, injection, Ruber band ligation etc. Attended and participles more than 35 seminar and workshops with 10 research paper publication in varies National and International journals.
